extraction.one_line_summary: LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel won from a reduced group after CARAPAZ attacked early on the Col de la Loze and URÁN cracked in the final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain team destructive pacing on Madeleine descent eliminated breakaway advantage five miles before summit, unconventional front-loaded aggression.
CARAPAZ attacked solo with 10 miles remaining, gap unsustained but forcing UAE/Jumbo to chase hard while LÓPEZ conserved energy.
ROGLIČ accelerated unnecessarily before Madeleine summit just to control descent positioning, revealing overcautious mindset despite already controlling race.
URÁN's irregular-gradient weakness exposed on Loze's steep kicks versus flat sections, losing 1:20 despite sitting 11 seconds back pre-stage.

rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: first Tour stage win on irregular-gradient climb, moved to 1:26 GC, high-altitude physiology advantage exploited perfectly
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: extended GC lead from 40 to 57 seconds, shows defensive strength but unnecessary acceleration suggests nerves
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: lost only 15 seconds to ROGLIČ, took polkadot jersey, UAE now committed to jersey defense tomorrow
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: solo attack at 10-mile mark, finished around 10th despite unsupported effort, strongest Ineos rider by far
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: cracked on irregular gradients losing 1:20, motor unsuited to steep kicks with flat stretches, podium hopes damaged
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: fourth place despite early work for ROGLIČ, exceptional climbing form on steep gradients
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: fifth at 1:01, solid result suggesting podium contention still viable
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: sixth place, consistently present in final group without threatening for stage
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: team worked all day but finished 1:48 down, failed to capitalize on preparation
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: beat SAGAN at intermediate sprint taking two-point gain, now 278 to 231 green jersey lead
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: late positioning at intermediate sprint, cannot match BENNETT's acceleration when following
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: jumped early at intermediate sprint showing superior positioning instincts
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: top-10 finish supporting ROGLIČ on gradients that don't suit his motor
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: joined early breakaway on Madeleine taking 15 KOM points, tactical presence only
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: neutral: early breakaway companion, 12 KOM points, no GC impact
